_meta.description: Template name -> Klaviyo ID registry. Every entry tagged with language. See LANGUAGE-SEPARATION.md.

en._note: KEEP LIVE per founder directive 2026-04-16 — do NOT archive. Rewrite to EN voice when EN pattern library has sufficient confidence.

shared._vip_note: vip promoted to YzbgxD (AI-built 2026-04-13: 3+ orders + CLV>2000). Legacy SdJBtU kept for historical reference only; do not use for new sends.

ai_built_2026_04_14._note: AI-built segments. None match Ponytail Launch 1:1 — UkesRj (Engaged 60d) is reused as composition primitive. At-Risk useful for future win-back. VIP + HighAOV reserved for future cross-sell.

ar.buyers_365d_purpose: Annual reactivation · Ramadan/Eid/year-end promos · broad re-engagement
ar.one_time_buyers_60d_plus_definition: $locale_language=ar AND Placed Order count alltime =1 AND Placed Order count last 60d =0
ar.engaged_non_buyers_definition: $locale_language=ar AND (Opened|Clicked in last 90d) AND Placed Order count alltime =0
ar.lapsed_buyers_180d_definition: $locale_language=ar AND Placed Order count alltime ≥1 AND Placed Order count last 180d =0
ar._build_note: All AR segments use $locale_language='ar' custom property. Suppression stack applied at campaign send layer.

en._build_note: All EN segments use $locale_language='en' custom property. Mirror of AR lifecycle set. Counts smaller because Zen Hair is predominantly Arabic audience (528 total EN profiles vs 21k+ AR).

lifetime_value.low_definition: Placed Order sum alltime >0 AND <500 SAR
lifetime_value.mid_definition: Placed Order sum alltime ≥500 AND <2000 SAR
lifetime_value._note: VjjgUC was broken (used dead metric Xf2suC) — PATCHed 2026-04-16 to use RFkPcF sum. LV tiers sum to 5,068 = total lifetime buyers in account.

_meta.purpose: Per-product buyer cohorts for ty-6 cross-sell, win-back, product-launch targeting
_meta.api_note: metric_filters on ProductID (flat scalar) works. metric_filters on Items (array) does NOT work — Klaviyo segment engine cannot traverse arrays. Always use XFDwkK (per-line-item event) for product filtering, never RFkPcF (per-order event with Items array).

bought_ponytail.name: AR | Bought Ponytail
bought_ponytail.purpose: Exclusion set for AR ty-6 ponytail cross-sell

bought_ponytail.name: EN | Bought Ponytail
bought_ponytail.purpose: Exclusion set for EN ty-6 ponytail cross-sell

segments_needed._status_2026_04_16: RESOLVED. AR + EN buyers 90d built via POST /api/segments at IDs US9JzM + W3yztD. Engagement gate + suppression stack intentionally dropped (applied at campaign send time instead).
_api_truth_learned_2026_04_16: Klaviyo Segment API accepts profile-property filters on custom properties like properties['$locale_language']. WmJkqU proves this works; $locale_language is auto-populated by Klaviyo alongside the built-in `locale` attribute.
Conditions WITHIN the same condition_group are OR'd. Condition GROUPS (top-level) are AND'd. Forgetting this cost us one iteration (UaJFDd/RKhKw7 returned impossible counts).
Built-in `locale` attribute is NOT a valid segment-condition property — must use properties['$locale_language'] instead.

profile-group-membership accepts only LIST IDs, not segment IDs. UkesRj and suppression segments still cannot be referenced as primitives — this is a real limit, but a non-issue once we moved suppression to the campaign layer.

resolved_approach.purchase_filter: profile-metric RFkPcF, measurement:count, operator:greater-than 0, timeframe:in-the-last 90 day
resolved_approach.suppression: Applied via Klaviyo campaign 'Excluded audience' (8-segment stack from registry.suppression_stack), NOT in segment definition
resolved_approach.engagement_gate: Dropped — buyers in last 90d are de facto engaged; matches T4djTX pattern

audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.Ri2yYm: Wellcome | Sign up form — 17,170 profiles (main subscriber pool, mixed AR/EN)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.UZL6as: AM | Arabic | Squeeze Page — 0 profiles (previously assumed primary AR list, actually empty)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.Ufa2TB: AM | English | Squeeze Page — 0 profiles (previously assumed primary EN list, actually empty)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.UkesRj: Engaged 60d segment — 7,325 profiles (~98% Arabic locale per 100-profile sample)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.WmJkqU: AM | English Profiles segment — 528 profiles (usable as EN primitive in UI builds)

segments_needed.placed_order_canonical_metric: RFkPcF (Shopify integration) — active as of 2026-04-16, latest event same day. Ignore XFdah2 (Celery) and Xf2suC (API) for segment conditions — no recent events.

ar.buyers_90d_BUILT.definition: properties['$locale_language'] equals 'ar' AND Placed Order (RFkPcF) count >0 in last 90 days
ar.buyers_90d_BUILT.purpose: Ponytail Launch AR arm + future AR broadcasts

en.buyers_90d_BUILT.definition: properties['$locale_language'] equals 'en' AND Placed Order (RFkPcF) count >0 in last 90 days
en.buyers_90d_BUILT.purpose: Ponytail Launch EN arm + future EN broadcasts

suppression_stack_note: XDzbbr (AI | Exclude | Never Engaged) added 2026-04-16 per founder approval. Stricter than R7n5YH/RQvExN: 10+ received + 0 opens/clicks alltime.

ponytail-launch-ar.purpose: Ponytail Launch AR arm of language A/B

ponytail-launch-en.purpose: Ponytail Launch EN arm of language A/B
